{{CargoClone
|name=Black Piano Soundwave Lysander
|rank=red
|cabin=1
|id=1021
|gene1={race} HARD +50
|gene2={race} AFFCT +50
|gene3=Earth DMG +50
|gene4=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5={race} Leadership +1
|gene6=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7={race} Leadership +3
|}}
